title: Minute 330 of the US–Mexico Water Treaty: A Testament to Transboundary Cooperation Amidst Drought in the Colorado River Basin
description: SpeakForWater Episode 17: Minute 330 of the US–Mexico Water Treaty: A Testament to Transboundary Cooperation Amidst Drought in the Colorado River Basin. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
